rationale: In the citing paper, Borah and Tellis (2016) appears in a grouped literature sentence listing domains where microblogging has been studied (specifically, product recalls). The citation is used as broad background to map prior social-media research, not as a paper the authors build their theory, hypotheses, model structure, or empirical strategy on. There is no distinct follow-on discussion of this specific study's mechanisms or findings in the paper's conceptual development or results interpretation.
